title: Titanium Ores and Crafts
description: Add titanium ores in the minecraft world and their craftings
body:
# Titanium Ores and Crafts

Add Titanium ores in the minecraft world and their craftings

## This mod adds:
- Items (Titanium Ingot, Raw Titanium, Titanium Nugget)
- Tools (Titanium Sword, Titanium Pickaxe, Titanium Axe, Titanium Shovel, Titanium Hoe)
- Blocks (Raw Titanium Block, Titanium Block, Titanium ore Block)
- Armor (Titanium Helmet, Titanium Chestplate, Titanium Leggings, Titanium Boots)

## Compatible with Other Mods (Compatible Tags)

### Languages:
- English (en_us)
- Spanish (es_us, es_es, es_mx, es_ec, es_ve, es_uy)
- Portuguese (pt_br, pt_pt)
- Chinese (zh_cn)
- Russian (ru_ru)

Translated by AI
